body.docName: 分页查询合同档案信息
body.docCnt:
##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v2/archives/contract/page 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v2/archives/contract/page 
 ## 接口描述 
针对企业合同信息进行分页查询，支持基于合同类型编码、合同名称、合同编码、合同公司、合同供应商等参数进行搜索 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"请求头根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"请求体根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"contractLpcCode","required":false,"label":"%E5%90%88%E5%90%8C%E6%89%80%E5%B1%AC%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"","desc":"","maxLength":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"contractTypeCodeList","required":false,"label":"%E5%90%88%E5%90%8C%E6%89%80%E5%B1%9E%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%E9%9B%86%E5%90%88","exampleValue":"","desc":"%20%E5%90%88%E5%90%8C%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","maxLength":"30"},"children":[]},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"contractSupplierNam","required":false,"label":"%E4%B9%99%E6%96%B9%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%EF%BC%88%E4%BE%9B%E5%BA%94%E5%95%86%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0%EF%BC%89","exampleValue":"","desc":"","maxLength":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"contractStatusList","required":false,"label":"%E5%90%88%E5%90%8C%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81%E9%9B%86%E5%90%88","exampleValue":"","desc":"%200%EF%BC%9A%E5%AE%A1%E6%89%B9%E4%B8%AD%0A1%EF%BC%9A%E6%9C%AA%E5%B1%A5%E8%A1%8C%0A2%EF%BC%9A%E5%B1%A5%E8%A1%8C%E4%B8%AD%0A3%EF%BC%9A%E5%B7%B2%E7%BB%88%E6%AD%A2%0A4%EF%BC%9A%E5%B7%B2%E8%BF%87%E6%9C%9F%0A6%EF%BC%9A%E6%9A%82%E6%8C%82%E4%B8%AD%0A7%EF%BC%9A%E5%B7%B2%E5%AE%8C%E6%88%90%0A8%EF%BC%9A%E5%8F%98%E6%9B%B4%E5%AE%A1%E6%89%B9%E4%B8%AD"},"children":[]},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"contractName","required":false,"label":"%E5%90%88%E5%90%8C%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"contractCode","required":false,"label":"%E5%90%88%E5%90%8C%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"","desc":"","maxLength":"30"}},{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"start","required":true,"label":"%E5%88%86%E9%A1%B5%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E5%BC%80%E5%A7%8B%E4%BD%8D%E7%BD%AE","exampleValue":"0","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"limit","required":true,"label":"%E5%88%86%E9%A1%B5%E9%9C%80%E8%A6%81%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E7%9A%84%E6%95%B0%E9%87%8F","exampleValue":"50","desc":""}}]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"query根节点"}}]</restparamstable>

body.docCntHtml:
接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v2/archives/contract/page

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v2/archives/contract/page

接口描述

针对企业合同信息进行分页查询，支持基于合同类型编码、合同名称、合同编码、合同公司、合同供应商等参数进行搜索

调用方式

METHOD: POST
